zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Soule於1703年11月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，她的父親William Soule32歲，母親Hannah37歲。她於1723年11月28日與Samuel Howland Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1746年3月26日在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托享年42歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托維斯波特格林 艾倫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Soule于1703年11月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，她的父亲William Soule32岁，母亲Hannah37岁。她于1723年11月28日与Samuel Howland Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1746年3月26日在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托享年42岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托維斯波特格林 艾倫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Soule
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): of Norman origin, a variant of   Soul  .

French (Soulé): topographic name for someone who lived in a house exposed to sun, a variant of Soulier 2; or a habitational name from Soulé, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France.
History: George Soule (1600–80), one of the passengers on the Mayflower in 1620, was one of the founders of Duxbury, MA, where he became comparatively wealthy. He left eight children.

variants.name: Sowle
meanings: English: variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Soul
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Soules near Saint-Lô (Manche, France).
French (mainly Manche): variant of Saoul, a nickname from saoul ‘full, satiated; drunk’, figuratively also ‘surfeited with something’.

History: The Scottish family of this name traces the name back to Ranulf de Soulis (died before 1170), a Norman knight who came to Scotland with King David I and served as his cupbearer. Sir John Soulis (died before 1310) was appointed ‘guardian of Scotland’ by John Balliol in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Soule was born on 8 November 1703, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Soule, was 32 and her mother, Hannah, was 37. She married Samuel Howland Sr. on 28 November 1723, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 26 March 1746, in Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 42, and was buried in Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Soule est née le 8 novembre 1703, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Soule, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hannah, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Howland Sr. le 28 novembre 1723, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1746, à Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Soule am 8. November 1703 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Soule 32 und ihre Mutter Hannah 37. Sie hat am 28. November 1723 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Samuel Howland Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1746 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Soule è nata il il 8 novembre 1703 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Soule, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Hannah, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Howland Sr. il 28 novembre 1723, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 26 marzo 1746, nel Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Souleが1703年11月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父William Souleは32歳，母Hannahは37歳であった。1723年11月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスでSamuel Howland Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1746年3月26日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルで42歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルウエストプオルトグレン アレン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Soule(이)가 1703년 11월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Soule(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1723년 11월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 Samuel Howland Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1746년 3월 26일 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 웨스트포트 그린 앨렌 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.8 November 1703–26 March 1746: 8 de novembro de 1703–26 de março de 1746

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Soule nasceu em 8 de novembro de 1703, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Soule, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hannah, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Howland Sr. em 28 de novembro de 1723, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de março de 1746, em Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Soule родилась 8 ноября 1703 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Soule было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Howland Sr. 28 ноября 1723 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 26 марта 1746 г. в местности бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности грин аллен кеметири, вестпорт, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Soule nació el 8 de noviembre de 1703, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Soule, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Hannah, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Samuel Howland Sr. el 28 de noviembre de 1723, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1746, en Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Green Allen Cemetery, Westport, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
